title: 🏷️ RACING SESSION
data_structure:
```typescript
[
    {
        name: 'name',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'Grand Prix',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'start_date',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '2025-05-25',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'start_time',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: '15:00',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'duration',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 120,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'duration_unit',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'min',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
    {
        name: 'distance',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 61,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'distance_unit',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: false,
        example: 'laps',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['string'],
    },
]
```
